<<code language="ocaml" | sig
  exception Not_connected
  exception Permission_denied
  val disconnect_all : ?user_indep:bool -> unit -> unit Lwt.t
  val disconnect : unit -> unit Lwt.t
  val connected_fun :
    ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny_fun:(Types.User.id option -> 'c Lwt.t) ->
    (Types.User.id -> 'a -> 'b -> 'c Lwt.t) -> 'a -> 'b -> 'c Lwt.t
  val connected_rpc :
    ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny_fun:(Types.User.id option -> 'b Lwt.t) ->
    (Types.User.id -> 'a -> 'b Lwt.t) -> 'a -> 'b Lwt.t
  val connected_wrapper :
    ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
    ?deny_fun:(Types.User.id option -> 'b Lwt.t) ->
    ?force_unconnected:bool -> ('a -> 'b Lwt.t) -> 'a -> 'b Lwt.t
  module Opt :
    sig
      val connected_fun :
        ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
        ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
        ?deny_fun:(Types.User.id option -> 'c Lwt.t) ->
        ?force_unconnected:bool ->
        (Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b -> 'c Lwt.t) ->
        'a -> 'b -> 'c Lwt.t
      val connected_rpc :
        ?allow:Types.Group.t list ->
        ?deny:Types.Group.t list ->
        ?deny_fun:(Types.User.id option -> 'b Lwt.t) ->
        ?force_unconnected:bool ->
        (Types.User.id option -> 'a -> 'b Lwt.t) -> 'a -> 'b Lwt.t
    end
  val get_current_userid_o : (unit -> Types.User.id option) Stdlib.ref
end >>
